hypothesis: Augmenting CompGen with explicit local geometric descriptors of the adsorption motif (adsorbate center–first-shell distances, surface facet label, and a local strain proxy) in the conditioning signals and applying modest symmetry-aware constraints during diffusion will improve cross-domain transferability and adsorption-energy fidelity, yielding two-shell compositions that map to physically realizable 3D adsorption geometries with closer DFT energies on OC20 and HEA datasets than a composition-only baseline.
